overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 featuring Geralt exploring a medieval stone castle at dusk. The character moves from dark interior corridors and staircases through covered walkways, briefly enters a warm-lit storage room, then proceeds through open courtyards and finally emerges onto a cliffside overlook with guards and a panoramic valley view.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark stone castle corridor with spiral staircase

events.description: begins ascending narrow stone spiral staircase

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks through dimly lit stone corridors and ascends a tight spiral staircase

entered.detail: rough-hewn dark stone blocks forming corridor walls
heavy wooden door with metal studs at corridor end
worn stone steps winding upward in tight spiral
narrow slit window in stone wall

segments.scene_description: Geralt navigates through dark, enclosed stone corridors illuminated by sparse torchlight. The environment consists of rough stone walls and a narrow spiral staircase that he ascends, with no other characters or vegetation present.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered castle walkway overlooking central courtyard

events.description: exits dark interior into covered walkway with first view of castle courtyard and dusk sky
turns right along the covered walkway, revealing more of the courtyard

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks along a covered stone walkway, observing the castle keep and courtyard ahead

entered.detail: wooden beam ceiling of the covered passage
large central stone keep with illuminated windows
wall-mounted iron torch holder with flame
grassy area visible through walkway openings

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the dark interior, Geralt enters a covered stone walkway that opens onto the castle courtyard. The dusk sky becomes visible for the first time, revealing the main castle keep ahead with warm lights glowing from its windows. The walkway features wooden roofing and stone railings overlooking grassy areas.

scene_state.functional_zone: small storage room with wooden shelving

events.description: enters small interior room with warm candlelight from the covered walkway
exits storage room back to darker corridor

agents.ego_description: Geralt enters a small storage room, briefly examines the shelves, then exits through a dark doorway

entered.detail: tall wooden shelving unit against stone wall
clay jars and containers on shelves
orange-yellow light source illuminating the room

segments.scene_description: Geralt briefly detours into a small storage room illuminated by warm candlelight. The room contains wooden shelves stocked with pottery jars. After a moment, he exits through a dark doorway, returning toward the exterior areas.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle courtyard with twin towers and grand staircase

events.description: descends from covered walkway into open courtyard with full sky visibility
begins ascending wide stone staircase toward main castle entrance
crescent moon becomes visible in purple dusk sky

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks across the open courtyard and ascends a wide stone staircase flanked by towers

entered.detail: tall stone towers with crenellations flanking the stairs
thin crescent moon visible in purple dusk sky
broad stone staircase leading up to castle entrance
half-timbered medieval building with white plaster and dark beams

segments.scene_description: Geralt emerges into the open castle courtyard under a purple dusk sky. He approaches and ascends a grand stone staircase flanked by tall towers, with the main castle keep looming ahead. The environment transitions from enclosed to fully open, with grass and the crescent moon becoming visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone gate tunnel opening to cliffside path

events.description: enters wooden gate into narrow stone tunnel
emerges from tunnel onto exposed cliffside path with torch-lit guards

agents.ego_description: Geralt passes through a gate tunnel and emerges onto a cliffside path, walking past armored guards stationed by a campfire

notable_agents.action: armored guard standing watch near a burning brazier

entered.detail: heavy wooden gate with metal bands
arched stone tunnel leading through the castle wall
wooden wagon with barrels parked on cliffside path
burning brazier providing light for the guards
rocky cliff edge overlooking vast landscape

segments.scene_description: Geralt enters a stone tunnel through a heavy wooden gate, transitioning back to enclosed space. He emerges onto an exposed cliffside path where armored guards stand watch near a burning brazier and wooden cart. The scene shifts from the castle interior to the precipice edge.

scene_state.functional_zone: cliffside overlook with panoramic valley view

events.description: stops at cliff edge to observe the vast landscape view
pans camera to survey distant mountains and valley

agents.ego_description: Geralt stands at the cliff edge, surveying the expansive valley and distant mountains under the purple night sky

entered.detail: sweeping view of distant valleys and terrain below
mountain range visible on horizon under dusk sky
deep purple and blue twilight sky with stars

segments.scene_description: At the cliff's edge, Geralt pauses to take in the breathtaking panoramic view of the vast valley and distant mountains under a deep purple dusk sky. The camera pans across the landscape, showing the expansive terrain stretching to the horizon, with the castle structures now behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the claustrophobic depths of a stone fortress out toward a vast, open mountain vista at dusk. It begins in dark, enclosed corridors and a narrow spiral staircase lit by sparse torches, before emerging into a covered walkway where the purple evening sky first becomes visible. The camera briefly detours into a warm, candlelit storage room filled with pottery jars before returning to the exterior to ascend a grand staircase flanked by towers under a crescent moon. After passing through a heavy wooden gate and a brief tunnel, the scene opens onto an exposed cliffside path where armored guards stand by a burning brazier. Finally, the camera reaches the precipice and pans across a breathtaking panoramic view of a distant valley and mountains stretching toward the horizon.
